headline: Comcast: A Risky Coiled Spring At 4.4x Earnings
summary: Comcast (CMCSA) stock is rated a Buy at $22, with a deep value profile but faces intense broadband competition and revenue pressures. Read the full analysis here.

headline: Verizon drops 2 new plans as wireless customers flee high prices
summary: After losing about 2.25 million customers in its wireless business over the past three years, mainly due to price increases, Verizon is following in the footsteps of its top rivals by introducing two new plans focused on simplicity and affordability to improve retention.
